description_long: This refrigerator features a retro-inspired, boxy design with a glossy teal exterior and metallic trim. The front is divided into two compartments, each with a prominent, horizontally oriented handle, suggesting a freezer section above and a refrigerator section below. The sides are smooth and unadorned, while the back displays a series of horizontal vent grilles, likely for heat dissipation. The handles are metallic and protrude outward, making them easy to grip. The overall construction appears robust, with a hard, smooth finish typical of enameled or powder-coated metal appliances. No visible branding or control panels are present on the exterior.
description: A teal, retro-style refrigerator with two metallic handles and a vented back, featuring a glossy, hard finish.
description_view_0: The left side of the refrigerator is visible, showing a smooth, uninterrupted teal surface with a slight metallic trim.
description_view_1: The front view reveals two distinct compartments with large, metallic, protruding handles and a glossy teal finish.
description_view_2: The right side mirrors the left, with a smooth teal surface and no additional features visible.
description_view_3: The back view displays a series of horizontal vent grilles, indicating the location of the cooling system.
attribute_door_handle_style: Protruding, horizontal metallic handles placed on the front of each compartment door.
attribute_vent_or_grille_pattern: Horizontal slats covering most of the back surface.
